user.title: Actionable Reminders
user.description: Setting up Actionable Reminders hub with sensible defaults.

reminder_step1.title: Create Reminder - Step 1 of 3
reminder_step1.description: Enter the reminder name, how often it should repeat, and the question to ask.

data_description.reminder_name: A unique name for this reminder (e.g., 'Give dogs meds', 'Take out recycling')
data_description.schedule_type: How often this reminder should repeat
data_description.message: The question to ask when the reminder triggers (e.g., 'Did you give the dogs their meds?')

reminder_step2.title: Create Reminder - Step 2 of 3
reminder_step2.description:
Configure when '{reminder_name}' should trigger.

Schedule type: {schedule_type}

data_description.schedule_time: What time should the reminder trigger?
data_description.schedule_monthly_type: Choose between a specific day (1-31) or a week pattern (e.g., 'First Wednesday')

reminder_step3.title: Create Reminder - Step 3 of 3
reminder_step3.description:
Configure the monthly pattern for '{reminder_name}'.

Pattern type: {monthly_type}

error.name_exists: A reminder with this name already exists

init.title: Configure Reminder
init.description: What would you like to configure?

edit_schedule.title: Edit Schedule
edit_schedule.description:
Change when this reminder triggers.

Schedule type: {schedule_type}

edit_messages.title: Edit Messages
edit_messages.description:
Enter one message per line. A random message will be chosen each time.

You can use {reminder_name} as a placeholder in your messages.

data_description.prompt_messages_text: Questions to ask (e.g., 'Did you take out the recycling?')
data_description.ack_messages_text: Responses when marked done (e.g., 'Thank you!', 'Great, marked as done!')
data_description.dismiss_messages_text: Responses when dismissed (e.g., 'Okay, I'll remind you again soon.')

edit_notifications.title: Edit Notifications
edit_notifications.description:
Configure where notifications should be sent.

Leave mobile service or Alexa devices empty to use hub defaults.

data_description.mobile_notify_service: Which mobile notify service to use (e.g., notify.mobile_app)
data_description.alexa_devices: Which Alexa/Echo devices to announce on
data_description.escalation_volume: Volume for Alexa announcements during escalation (0.0 - 1.0)

edit_retry.title: Edit Retry & Escalation
edit_retry.description:
Configure how aggressively the reminder should retry.

Leave empty to use hub defaults.

After max retries, enters escalation mode (louder, rotating devices). After max escalations, auto-skips for the day.

edit_presence_quiet.title: Edit Presence & Quiet Hours
edit_presence_quiet.description:
Configure when reminders should be blocked.

Leave empty to use hub defaults.

data_description.presence_sensors: Don't prompt if nobody is home (at least one sensor must be 'on')
data_description.catchup_on_arrival: Trigger reminder immediately when someone arrives home

data_description.optional: Optional reminders can be skipped/dismissed without consequence
data_description.until_done: Keeps prompting daily until marked as done
